documentation:
# Autoverse CLI

The new implementation of the Autoverse CLI

functions.name: avrs.launcher_util.validate_license_file
documentation:
Given file path, load and validate license info. Returns tuple of bool
indicating success, string for status, and dict of license info from file

functions.name: avrs.launcher_util.try_get_launcher_download_keys
documentation:
Uses license info stored in config to requrest download keys from API.
These keys can be used to authenticate downloads from bucket

functions.name: avrs.launcher_util.has_launcher_download_keys
documentation: Checks for required config values for download keys

functions.name: avrs.launcher_util.get_launcher_license_status_string
documentation:
Builds a string representation of where the CLI stands
as far as being configured as a launcher able to download simulator builds

functions.name: avrs.launcher_util.get_launcher_build_info
documentation: Contacts API to discover the current latest build version

functions.name: avrs.launcher_util.download_simulator_archive
documentation: Downloads the latest version of the simulator from the builds bucket

functions.name: avrs.launcher_util.is_installed_sim
documentation:
Check if the given path appears to be the root of
a simulator installation

functions.name: avrs.argparse_help.generate_argparse_docs
documentation: Try to generate a nice markdown with all help from a parser

functions.name: avrs.cfg.add_cached_file
documentation: Save a file to be re-used later to a cached location
